ansible-lint.description: Run the repo-managed ansible-lint policy against playbooks and the packaged collection.

ansible-syntax.description: Syntax check every tracked playbook outside the shared playbook task includes.

dependency-graph.description: Validate the service dependency graph schema, cross references, generated Mermaid markdown, and generated Excalidraw architecture scenes.
dependency-graph.command: python scripts/validate_dependency_graph.py >/dev/null && python scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --check >/dev/null && python scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check >/dev/null

dependency-direction.description: Reject reusable platform modules that import outward into scripts/ composition roots or dynamically load script-only helpers.

packer-validate.description: Validate all Packer templates when the repo carries them; otherwise report a no-op pass.

schema-validation.description: Validate canonical repository data models, provider-boundary anti-corruption guards, capability-contract catalogs, the committed platform manifest artifact, operator roster schema, cross references, and receipt schemas.
schema-validation.command: python scripts/provider_boundary_catalog.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/capability_contracts.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/platform_manifest.py --check >/dev/null && python scripts/data_catalog.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/operator_manager.py validate >/dev/null && python scripts/service_catalog.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/environment_topology.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/subdomain_catalog.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/subdomain_exposure_audit.py --validate >/dev/null && ./scripts/agent_tool_registry.py --export-mcp >/dev/null && python scripts/mutation_audit.py --validate-schema >/dev/null

policy-validation.description: Run the ADR 0230 shared OPA and Conftest policy checks against command approval, promotion eligibility, runner admission, and service-boundary invariants.

alert-rule-validation.description: Regenerate SLO and HTTPS/TLS Prometheus rules and enforce severity plus runbook annotations on committed alert rules.
alert-rule-validation.command: python scripts/generate_slo_rules.py --check >/dev/null && python scripts/generate_https_tls_assurance.py --check >/dev/null && python scripts/validate_alert_rules.py

security-scan.description: Run the repository filesystem through the pinned Trivy security scan policy.
security-scan.command: trivy fs --scanners misconfig,secret --skip-db-update --skip-dirs .ansible --skip-dirs .git --skip-dirs .worktrees --skip-files docker/check-runners/ansible/Dockerfile --skip-files docker/check-runners/infra/Dockerfile --skip-files docker/check-runners/python/Dockerfile --skip-files docker/check-runners/security/Dockerfile --skip-files uv.lock --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL .

artifact-secret-scan.description: Scan published receipts and generated publication artifacts for secrets with the repo-managed gitleaks rules.

service-completeness.description: Enforce the ADR 0107 extension checklist for non-grandfathered services.

tofu-validate.description: Validate OpenTofu configuration if the repo carries a tofu root; otherwise report a no-op pass.
tofu-validate.command: if [ -d tofu ]; then tofu -chdir=tofu validate; else echo 'No tofu configuration present'; fi

type-check.description: Type check the gate orchestration code and the manifest-backed Docker runner surfaces.
type-check.command: mypy --cache-dir /tmp/mypy-cache scripts/parallel_check.py scripts/run_gate.py scripts/gate_status.py scripts/log_gate_bypass.py scripts/policy_checks.py scripts/policy_toolchain.py config/windmill/scripts/post-merge-gate.py tests/test_parallel_check.py tests/test_validation_gate.py tests/test_policy_checks.py tests/test_command_catalog.py

integration-tests.description: Run the ADR 0111 non-destructive integration suite against staging if active, or record a repo-managed skip if no integration target is currently available.

yaml-lint.description: Run full-repository yamllint across tracked YAML files.
